  "findings": [
    "Mechanical seal face contamination from bare-hand touch"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Clean the contaminated seal faces using an approved solvent such as isopropyl alcohol and lint-free wipes before final assembly, or replace the seal if damage has occurred."
  ],
  "rationale": "Touching mechanical seal faces with bare hands transfers skin oils, acids, and microscopic dirt, which can cause premature seal failure, uneven wear, or immediate leakage upon startup. The faces must be cleaned with a residue-free solvent and lint-free wipes, and handled only with clean gloves.",
  "references": [
    "SKF/Timken mounting guides",
    "FSA (Fluid Sealing Association) Mechanical Seals Installation Guide"
  ]
}
